_note: PvE battle-result classification. VERIFIED 2026-07-15 (2 wins + 1 loss captured).

win.battle_result:
AzRaa gained 0 strength
AzRaa has gained 676 experience!
AzRaa gained 77 gold!

loss.battle_result: Grand Sole Protector has weakened LinuXX_2 by 2
loss.marker: contains '{defenderName} has weakened {yourName} by {N}' AND no 'gained ... experience'

classification_rule: Prefer battle_result TEXT: win iff it contains 'has gained {N} experience!'; loss iff '{mob} has weakened {you}' with no exp gain. NOTE: on a re-fetched (persisted) /attack/{id}/ page, the JS var attacker_result can read 'Win!' even for a loss — do NOT rely on attacker_result alone off a persisted page; battle_result text is authoritative.
